title: Tapping to Anchor Trust in Multi-Million Investments
subtitle: A tapping practice for working through the intimidation of large-scale investing and building settled confidence at a seven-figure level
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 75 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the fear that multi-million investments are too big or too risky to manage, and moves toward a grounded confidence in handling large-scale deals with care and wisdom.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 75 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the scale of investment you are working toward feels beyond what you can hold or handle without making costly mistakes.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 75 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the intimidation of large-scale investing and the fear of making costly mistakes at a multi-million level, and moves toward settled confidence in handling those deals with due diligence and a strong team.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though multi-million investments once felt intimidating, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I feared making costly mistakes, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I wasn't sure I could think that big, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I now see myself as a large-scale investor.
Side of eye: I welcome big, profitable opportunities.
Under eye: I trust my due diligence and team.
Under nose: I feel calm with seven-figure deals.
Chin: I know I can handle risk with wisdom.
Collarbone: I believe these investments grow our future.
Under arm: I feel strong and capable at this level.
Top of head: I trust multi-million moves completely.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: I invest confidently at a multi-million scale.
Side of eye: I trust my research and guidance.
Under eye: I watch wealth multiply year after year.
Under nose: I feel excited, not stressed, about big deals.
Chin: I enjoy this level of wealth creation.
Collarbone: I grow assets that last for generations.
Under arm: I love how natural large investments now feel.
Top of head: I trust and thrive with multi-million wealth.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 75 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
